framework.name: Threat Model for Agent Tx Pipelines
framework.description: Covers prompt injection, policy misuse, key compromise, adversarial execution (MEV), multi-agent collusion. The 'policy misuse' category is relevant to delegation abuse but the paper doesn't detail revocation latency attacks specifically.
framework.raw_quote: a threat model tailored to agent-driven transaction pipelines that captures risks ranging from prompt injection and policy misuse to key compromise, adversarial execution dynamics, and multi-agent collusion

source.title: Autonomous Agents on Blockchains: Standards, Execution Models, and ...
